use_cases: User login and authentication for web applications
Secure portal access with visual feedback for SaaS platforms
Customer account login for e-commerce websites
Financial service authentication with modern styling
Developer tools login with interactive WebGL background
ai_summary: A sophisticated login form featuring an interactive WebGL smokey/ripple background effect that responds to mouse movement, combined with glass-morphism styled input fields. Includes password visibility toggle, form validation indicators, and gradient hover effects on interactive elements. Built with Lucide icons and custom shader effects for a premium authentication experience.
